name: button
description: A fully customizable button widget that triggers any action provided by a plugin when clicked.

config.name: label
config.label: Label
config.description: The text displayed on the button. Leave empty to show no label, e.g. when using a background image instead.

config.name: label_font
config.label: Font
config.description: The font family used to render the button label.

config.name: label_font_size
config.label: Font Size
config.description: The font size of the button label in pixels.

config.name: label_color
config.label: Color
config.description: The color of the button label text.

config.name: background_color
config.label: Color
config.description: The background fill color of the button. Ignored when a background image is set.

config.name: background_image
config.label: Image
config.description: An optional background image for the button. When set, it replaces the background color and fills the button area.

config.name: border_color
config.label: Color
config.description: The color of the button border.

config.name: border_width
config.label: Width
config.description: The thickness of the button border in pixels. Set to 0 to hide the border.

config.name: border_radius
config.label: Radius
config.description: The corner rounding of the button border. Accepts CSS values such as '8px' or '50%' for a pill/circle shape.
